title: Copy file between boards

posts.author: johnners (Drew)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi All,

I’m trying to build a scenario on Make.com where if I upload a file to an item on Board 1, it copies that file to the files column on Board 2…

I’ve got it right to the point of adding the file to the new board.

I’m using “Add a File to a File Column Value” module however it reports an error - its expecting a string.

Can anyone help me work out how to code it please?

monday_0012978×782 94 KB

monday_002692×1079 58.9 KB

monday_0031251×1358 147 KB

posts.author: jclark009 (Jon Clark)
posts.cookedHtml: @johnners , did you ever figure out a fix for this?

posts.author: johnners (Drew)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @jclark009

Unfortunately not - I managed to get it to copy the files across but I started a loop and within seconds had duplicated the file about 500 times, so I gave up and moved on to other issues we’ve been having with monday.

posts.author: YuvrajSingh (Yuvraj Singh Rajput)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @johnners

You can copy files between monday boards(different and same) and file columns using Copy Files Pro.
